name: Sony Vario-Tessar T* FE 24-70mm f/4 ZA OSS Lens
description: Walk around all day with the Vario-Tessar T* FE 24-70mm f/4 ZA OSS Lens from Sony, a compact full-frame option that covers wide-angle to short telephoto perspectives for working with a variety of different shooting styles and subjects.

features.Key Features:: E-Mount Lens/Full-Frame Format | Aperture Range: f/4 to f/22 | One ED and Five Aspherical Elements | ZEISS T* Anti-Reflective Coating | Linear Autofocus Motor; Internal Focus | Optical SteadyShot Image Stabilization | Dust and Moisture-Resistant Construction | Rounded 7-Blade Diaphragm
features.What’s In the Box?: Sony Vario-Tessar T* FE 24-70mm f/4 ZA OSS Lens | Sony ALC-SH130 Lens Hood | Sony ALC-F67S 67mm Front Lens Cap | Sony ALC-R1EM Rear Lens Cap | Lens Pouch | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
